name: Zero Hallucination, by Construction: Hallucination-Aware Layered Oversight for Trustworthy Enterprise AI
summary: arXiv:2607.17883v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Enterprises will not deploy AI agents they cannot trust, and the most-cited reason for distrust is hallucination: confident, fluent output that is...
description: arXiv:2607.17883v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Enterprises will not deploy AI agents they cannot trust, and the most-cited reason for distrust is hallucination: confident, fluent output that is simply not true. The common response is to wait for a model that does not hallucinate. We argue that this is the wrong target. Large language models are, by construction, capable of generating unsuppo...
author: Bogdan Raduta, Horia Velicu, Alexandru Preda, Serban Chiricescu
